# Retrospective Template

Use this after larger work, especially if the team learned a new rule worth encoding.

## Task or plan

- `[path]`

## What worked

- `[item]`

## What slowed us down

- `[item]`

## What the repository was missing

- `[doc, check, script, or architecture gap]`

## What should become a permanent rule

- `[rule to encode in docs or checks]`

## Follow-up tasks

- `[task]`
